note: Reviewed locally with the render-visual-reviewer rubric. No delegated subagent was used because this turn did not explicitly authorize multi-agent delegation.
visible_evidence: Page 1 fits the title, anonymous author line, abstract, and opening introduction without overlap.

Page 2 Figure 1 v16 is readable at page scale, removes the v15 footer and most microtext, keeps the four-stage schematic labels clear, and remains captioned as a schematic roadmap rather than empirical evidence.
Page 3 Method opening now keeps the non-flattening/source-read-only conversion statement in a complete paragraph with no dangling half-sentence.

Page 4 Method now explicitly describes ConvertAsset as a core-channel PreviewSurface approximation and states that static material-effect gates do not by themselves certify material-effect fidelity; the added text fits without overlap.

Page 6 Figure 2 uses real cropped render evidence with a widened proxy-detail row, and fits with Table 2 and body text without overlap; in-figure labels remain auxiliary while the caption carries the claim boundary.
Page 7 tables fit within the page and do not overlap each other.

Page 8 no longer has stretched Discussion paragraph spacing after the ragged-bottom layout fix; the tightened Discussion text now warns against counting static conversion success, zero-MDL outputs, or effect-token coverage as visual or task success.

Page 9 Figure 3 is the selected InternNav rollout panel with purple/green navigation overlays, not a red material fallback or the material-effect contact sheet; its caption now uses Selected rather than Supplemental wording and remains attached to the image in the same single-column block.
Pages 10 and 11 contain References without obvious clipping or overflow.
Current 150-DPI contact-sheet re-render after the material-effect claim-boundary tightening shows no page-level overlap, blank page, detached caption, or reintroduced material-effect Figure 3.
risks: Figure 2 top row is a cropped proxy detail view, not an uncropped full-object view; the sublabel and caption disclose that boundary.
The final upload remains blocked by human route, OpenReview form-copy, runtime/AI/media, and final upload-decision gates.

layout_fix.change: Added \\raggedbottom to prevent bottom-alignment from stretching the short Discussion/Conclusion page.

figure3_layout_fix.change: Wrapped the single-column InternNav image and caption in a \\columnwidth minipage so the two-column layout cannot split the caption away from the image.

abstract_boundary_iteration.change: Tightened the abstract from the broader phrase 'proxy fidelity does not determine grounding behavior' to 'proxy fidelity alone is insufficient for downstream grounding claims'.

figure2_readability_iteration.change: Expanded the real-render proxy object cells to the same near-full text width as the GRScenes scene cells, increased the proxy row height, and regenerated Figure 2 without changing source render evidence.
